title: Salmon Tikka Masala
description: A classic Indian dish featuring salmon cooked in a creamy tomato sauce, served with a side of crispy polish salad.

ingredients.name: polish salad
ingredients.notes: crispy fried onions, chopped fresh cilantro

instructions: Marinate the salmon fillets in a mixture of lemon juice, salt, and garam masala for at least 30 minutes.
In a large saucepan, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium heat. Add the cumin powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato puree and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the heavy cream and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5-7 minutes.
Remove the salmon from the marinade and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the salmon in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
To serve, place the salmon on a plate and spoon the sauce over the top. Garnish with crispy onions and polish salad.
